title: Opening for Logistics Manager at IndiaPost

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at IndiaPost
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndiaPost! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndiaPost:
IndiaPost is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaPost!
